name: Maple Custard Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Aunt Jemima Syrup OR Lite Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring syrup to a boil over medium-high heat.
2. Reduce heat; boil for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and spoon about 2 tablespoons syrup into each of four 10-oz. glass custard cups, coating the bottom by tilting and rotating each cup. Chill for 15 minutes or until the syrup is hardened.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Combine eggs, sugar, and vanilla in a bowl.
6. Scald milk; stir quickly into the egg mixture.
7. Pour about three-quarters of the mixture into each prepared custard cup.
8. Place cups in a 13x9-inch baking pan on the center rack, pouring boiling water into the pan to within 1/2 inch of the top of the cups.
9. Bake for 1 hour or until a knife inserted 1 inch from the edge comes out clean. Remove cups from the water and chill.
To serve:
1. Loosen custard edges with a knife and invert onto a serving plate.
